description.ko: 우주의 심연, 그 절대적인 어둠 속에서 천체 현상이 발현되는 고요하고 무한한 깊이에 대한 탐구.
description.en: An exploration of the silent, infinite depths of the universe, where celestial phenomena emerge from the absolute darkness of the cosmic abyss.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of a bioluminescent nebula within the deep cosmic void, swirling dark matter, distant pulsars casting ethereal light, ultra-detailed textures, 8k resolution, surreal atmosphere, deep blues and purples, VOID-3 style.
